## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an "x" -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] 🧪 Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Maintenance (chore, build, or tooling changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## Checklist

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an "x" -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation

### Testing

- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)

### Security

- [ ] My code does not introduce any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets or sensitive information
- [ ] I have followed security best practices

### Offline Support

- [ ] My changes work offline (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested in offline mode
- [ ] My changes don't break offline functionality

### Performance

- [ ] My changes do not negatively impact performance
- [ ] I have considered bundle size implications
- [ ] I have optimized for low-end devices (if applicable)
